heading: Omitted
label: 696 Omitted
notes: CodificationSection, , , which related to transfer of individual property by the Secretary of the Interior to members of each tribe, was omitted from the Code as being of special and not general application.act Aug. 13, 1954, ch. 733, § 668 Stat. 725
